No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to health or well-being.

Quality Education.reason: The course provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and explicitly aims to develop 'global vision' (Target 4.7) through the study of a major supranational organization and international rules.

Gender Equality.reason: The course discusses the 'European Charter of Fundamental Rights', which includes principles of non-discrimination and equality, aligning with Target 5.1 and 5.c.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course analyzes the EU as the 'world's largest market' and discusses 'market order regulations', directly relating to economic growth and productivity (Targets 8.1, 8.2).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course explicitly discusses the 'latest EU AI Act', directly addressing the regulation of new technology and innovation, aligning with Target 9.5 and 9.b.

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course covers the 'European Charter of Fundamental Rights' and EU legal structures, which aim to reduce inequalities and eliminate discriminatory laws (Targets 10.2, 10.3).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to sustainable cities or communities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course explicitly discusses 'CBAM' (Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism), a policy tool directly related to encouraging cleaner industrial production and sustainable consumption patterns (Target 12.1).

Climate Action.reason: The course explicitly covers 'CBAM', a key EU policy designed to integrate climate change measures into trade, directly supporting Target 13.2.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or learning outcomes directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamentally about the EU's legal framework, institutions, and the rule of law, directly aligning with Targets 16.3 (rule of law), 16.6 (effective institutions), and 16.8 (global governance).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course analyzes the EU as a major international partnership and its laws' influence on international rules, aligning with Targets 17.14 (policy coherence) and 17.16 (global partnership).
